zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich  V von Braunschweig於大約1173年出生在德國布勞恩史維時，他的父親Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria45歲，母親Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony21歲。他於大約1209年與Agnes of Landsberg結婚。他去世於1227年4月28日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇布勞恩史維-盧包格布勞恩史維享年55歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇布勞恩史維-盧包格布勞恩史維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich  V von Braunschweig于大约1173年出生在德国布勞恩史維时，他的父亲Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria45岁，母亲Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony21岁。他于大约1209年与Agnes of Landsberg结婚。他去世于1227年4月28日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇布勞恩史維-盧包格布勞恩史維享年55岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇布勞恩史維-盧包格布勞恩史維。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Braunschweig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Juergen, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.

German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Braunschweig in Lower Saxony, known in English as Brunswick. The placename is from the genitive case of the ancient Germanic personal name Bruno (borne by the Duke of Saxony who founded the city in 861) + Old Saxon wīk ‘dwelling place’, ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich  V von Braunschweig was born about 1173, in Brunswick, Germany, his father, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, was 45 and his mother, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, was 21. He married Agnes of Landsberg about 1209. He died on 28 April 1227, in Braunschweig, Brunswick-Lüneburg, Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 55, and was buried in Braunschweig, Brunswick-Lüneburg, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich  V von Braunschweig est né environ 1173, à Braunschweig, Allemagne, son père, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agnes of Landsberg environ 1209. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1227, à Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich  V von Braunschweig um 1173 in Braunschweig, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria 45 und seine Mutter Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony 21. Er hat um 1209 Agnes of Landsberg geheiratet. Er starb am 28. April 1227 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich und wurde in Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich  V von Braunschweig è nato il circa 1173 nel Braunschweig, Germania, il suo padre, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Agnes of Landsberg circa 1209. Morì il 28 aprile 1227, nel Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich  V von Braunschweigが約1173年にドイツブラウンスチウエイグで生まれた時，父Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavariaは45歳，母Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxonyは21歳であった。約1209年にAgnes of Landsbergと結婚した。彼は1227年4月28日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチブラウンスチウエイグ-ルuネブルグブラウンスチウエイグで55歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチブラウンスチウエイグ-ルuネブルグブラウンスチウエイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich  V von Braunschweig(이)가 대략 1173년 독일 브라슈위그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1209년 Agnes of Landsberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1227년 4월 28일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 브라슈위그-u니버그 브라슈위그에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 브라슈위그-u니버그 브라슈위그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich  V von Braunschweig nasceu aproximadamente 1173, em Braunschweig, Alemanha, seu pai, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes of Landsberg aproximadamente 1209. Ele faleceu em 28 de abril de 1227, em Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich  V von Braunschweig родился около 1173 г. в местности браунщвиг, Германия, его отцу по имени Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes of Landsberg около 1209 г. Он умер 28 апреля 1227 г. в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг-лuнебург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг-лuнебург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich  V von Braunschweig nació aproximadamente 1173, en Braunschweig, Alemania, su papá, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Agnes of Landsberg aproximadamente 1209. Murió el 28 de abril de 1227, en Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
